top_findings: Homepage og:image missing — no social preview card on any platform
HowTo schema on /workflow deprecated since September 2023
robots.txt /*?* blocks site's own SearchAction /faq?q= endpoint
Hreflang not implemented despite 13 locales defined in code
quick_wins: Add og:image to homepage layout.tsx (30 min)
Replace HowTo with ItemList on /workflow (1 hr)
Add canonical + unique title to /estimate (20 min)
Remove duplicate ExtoArts suffix from /services and /portfolio titles (20 min)

findings.title: robots.txt /*?* blocks SearchAction /faq?q= endpoint
findings.description: Disallow: /*?* applies to all bots, blocking the site's own SearchAction and OpenSearch target URL /faq?q=
findings.recommendation: Add Allow: /faq?q= before the /*?* rule, or replace with Disallow: /*?utm_*

findings.title: Social redirect pages use 307 (temporary) instead of 308 (permanent)
findings.description: 307 does not pass PageRank. /discord, /youtube, /instagram, /twitter, /facebook, /threads all 307.
findings.recommendation: Set permanent: true in next.config.ts redirects

findings.title: www.extoarts.in does not redirect to non-www canonical
findings.description: www redirects to https://www.extoarts.in (adds HTTPS only), not to https://extoarts.in. Canonical is non-www.
findings.recommendation: Add Vercel redirect rule for www → non-www

findings.title: Social redirect pages in sitemap.xml are 307 redirects
findings.description: 6 social redirect URLs appear in sitemap but return 307. Wastes crawl budget.
findings.recommendation: Remove /discord, /youtube, /instagram, /twitter, /threads, /facebook from sitemap.ts

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: No CSP header on any response.
findings.recommendation: Add permissive CSP in next.config.ts headers()

findings.title: lastmod in sitemap always current timestamp
findings.description: All 20 sitemap entries share the same lastmod (build-time new Date()). Misleads Google crawl scheduler.
findings.recommendation: Store and reference real per-route content dates in sitemap.ts

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: All pages have unique meta descriptions
Canonical tags on all pages except /estimate
Keyword targeting on-point (YouTube video editing, thumbnail design, flat-fee, 10% agency fee)

findings.title: /estimate missing canonical tag + generic title
findings.description: No canonical tag. Title is identical to homepage fallback. Meta description is generic.
findings.recommendation: Add generateMetadata() with unique canonical, title 'YouTube Editing Cost Estimator | Get an Instant Quote | ExtoArts', and unique meta description

findings.title: Duplicate brand name in /services and /portfolio titles
findings.description: /services: 'YouTube Video Editing Services - Thumbnails & Shorts | ExtoArts | ExtoArts' (78 chars). /portfolio: 81 chars. Both over 60-char limit with duplicate suffix.
findings.recommendation: Remove second ExtoArts from both titles

findings.title: Homepage OG title weaker than page title
findings.description: Page title: 'YouTube Video Editing & Thumbnail Design | ExtoArts'. OG title: 'ExtoArts - YouTube Editing Agency'. Social shares under-sell.
findings.recommendation: Align og:title with page title or use deliberate social-optimised version

findings.title: Homepage H1 not keyword-optimised
findings.description: H1: 'Where You Are Valued.' — brand positioning, not search intent. Competitors rank for 'YouTube video editing agency'.
findings.recommendation: Consider keyword-forward H1 or ensure H2/paragraph with target keywords is above fold

findings.title: /collab meta description 165 chars (over 155 limit)
findings.description: 'Commission motion graphics, VFX, thumbnails, video editing, and post-production from ExtoArts. One-off creative work for brands and creators with a high quality bar.'
findings.recommendation: Trim to ≤155 chars

findings.title: Hreflang not implemented despite 13 locales in constants.ts
findings.description: HREFLANG_LOCALES array defines 13 English locales. Zero hreflang link tags in any page head.
findings.recommendation: Implement via alternates.languages in generateMetadata() across all pages

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: FAQPage on relevant pages (valuable for AI citation)

findings.title: HowTo schema on /workflow — deprecated September 2023
findings.description: HowTo rich results removed by Google Sept 2023. Schema generates zero SERP benefit and may flag stale markup.
findings.recommendation: Replace with ItemList schema. Preserve all 8 step contents.

findings.title: og:image missing on homepage
findings.description: No <meta property='og:image'> on homepage. Interior pages have it. All social shares of extoarts.in / show no image.
findings.recommendation: Add openGraph.images to root layout.tsx metadata using DEFAULT_OG_IMAGE

findings.title: Missing og:type and primary og:locale
findings.description: Has og:locale:alternate (en_GB, en_AU, en_CA) but no og:type or primary og:locale.
findings.recommendation: Add og:type: 'website' and og:locale: 'en_US'

findings.title: Missing og:image dimensions
findings.description: No og:image:width or og:image:height on any page. Some platforms skip image without dimensions.
findings.recommendation: Add og:image:width: 2048, og:image:height: 1144

findings.title: Missing VideoObject schema
findings.description: No VideoObject schema despite being a video editing agency with YouTube channel. Missed video rich result opportunity.
findings.recommendation: Add VideoObject schema to /portfolio for embedded/linked videos

findings.title: Missing Service schema on /services
findings.description: 4 services listed with no Service schema.
findings.recommendation: Add @type: Service for each offering with provider, serviceType, areaServed, offers

findings.title: Missing BreadcrumbList sitewide
findings.description: No BreadcrumbList schema or visible breadcrumb UI on any inner page.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList to all inner pages

findings.title: AggregateRating not linked to Trustpilot
findings.description: TRUSTPILOT_URL defined in constants.ts but not referenced in Organization or AggregateRating schema.
findings.recommendation: Add sameAs: Trustpilot URL to Organization schema

findings.title: No blog/article content despite 7 articles ready
findings.description: 7 well-written articles exist as RSS descriptions only. Competitors capture 'how to increase YouTube AVD', 'gaming thumbnail CTR tips' traffic that ExtoArts has content for but zero pages for.
findings.recommendation: Build /blog/[slug] pages (Task #2)

findings.title: AggregateRating review source unverifiable
findings.description: Ratings on multiple pages with no link to review platform. Trustpilot URL exists in code but unused in schema.
findings.recommendation: Wire AggregateRating to Trustpilot via sameAs and itemReviewed

findings.title: Portfolio page under-describes work
findings.description: 111-char meta description, 1727 words. No niche specificity. 72 images with likely generic alt text.
findings.recommendation: Expand copy with niche categories, style descriptions, and real results

findings.title: Contact page light on content
findings.description: 1690 words, primarily CTAs. No 'what to expect' content.
findings.recommendation: Add brief process section to improve E-E-A-T and reduce bounce

findings.title: Heavy animation library stack (Framer Motion + GSAP + Lenis + OGL)
findings.description: Combined JS payload likely 200-400KB gzipped. May cause TBT issues on mobile.
findings.recommendation: Run PageSpeed Insights mobile. If TBT > 200ms, lazy-load animation libraries

findings.title: 72 portfolio images from external CDN (iili.io)
findings.description: LCP risk on /portfolio. No control over image delivery speed.
findings.recommendation: Migrate to Vercel Blob or Cloudflare R2

findings.title: PSI data not available during audit
findings.description: PageSpeed Insights API rate-limited during audit. Run manually at pagespeed.web.dev
findings.recommendation: Target: LCP < 2.5s, INP < 200ms, CLS < 0.1 mobile

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: llms.txt v14.0 — exceptional quality with citations and benchmarks
robots.txt AI crawler section (12 crawlers explicitly allowed)

findings.title: Speakable schema CSS selectors may not match rendered DOM
findings.description: Uses .hero, .torn-banner, .services-grid, .steps-grid. Should be verified in server-rendered HTML.
findings.recommendation: Inspect production HTML source to confirm CSS classes are present server-side

findings.title: No passage-level AI-citable content on service/pricing pages
findings.description: Pages lack self-contained 134-167 word answer blocks that AI engines can cite directly.
findings.recommendation: Add one paragraph per key service page that directly answers 'What does ExtoArts cost / do / offer'

findings.title: No external entity authority signals
findings.description: Brand new (2024), no Wikipedia/Wikidata entry, no Clutch/G2 listings.
findings.recommendation: Submit to Clutch.co, DesignRush, G2 for indexed third-party citations

categories.name: Images
what_works: 0 images missing alt attributes across all pages
AVIF + WebP via Next.js Image component

findings.title: All portfolio and OG images on iili.io (uncontrolled CDN)
findings.description: No SLA, no cache headers control, single point of failure for all social previews and portfolio.
findings.recommendation: Migrate to Vercel Blob or Cloudflare R2

findings.title: Portfolio alt text quality likely generic
findings.description: 72 images have alt= attributes but auto-populated from data source — likely filename-level not descriptive.
findings.recommendation: Audit actual alt values; replace with descriptive keyword-rich alternatives

findings.title: No image sitemap
findings.description: Portfolio images may not be discoverable by Google Image Search without a sitemap-images.xml.
findings.recommendation: Add /sitemap-images.xml route in Next.js app router

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact
items: Remove social URLs from sitemap (20 min)

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Google Search Console setup + sitemap submission
